name: In every color
description: Slimes splash every hue across the forest. Hunt 50 of each color to restore the forest's balance.

name: Tasks Farmer
description: Complete 100 tasks and show your diligence to the people of the realm.

name: Novice
description: Every hero starts somewhere. Reach level 10 and step onto the path of adventure.

name: Ecologist
description: The world breathes easier thanks to your efforts. Recycle 1 000 items.

name: Amateur Miner
description: Copper glimmers in the veins of the earth. Gather 6 000 copper ores and begin your mining journey.

name: Miner
description: Iron shapes kingdoms. Gather 6 000 iron ores to build your legacy.

name: Expert Miner
description: Gold is the prize of experts. Gather 6 000 gold ores and shine above the rest.

name: Intermediate Miner
description: Coal fuels progress. Gather 6 000 coals and power the world.

name: Professional Miner
description: Mithril ore is the dream of miners. Gather 6 000 mithril ores and reach professional status.

name: Amateur Lumberjack
description: Ash wood is the first step to mastery. Gather 6 000 ash woods and begin your lumberjack career.

name: Lumberjack
description: Spruce forests echo with the sound of axes. Gather 6 000 spruce woods and earn the title of Lumberjack.

name: Intermediate Lumberjack
description: Birch trees test your skill. Gather 6 000 birch woods to master your craft.

name: Expert Lumberjack
description: Dead wood holds secrets of the forest. Gather 6 000 dead woods and prove your expertise.

name: Professional Lumberjack
description: Maple wood is the true professional’s choice. Gather 6,000 maple woods.

name: Amateur Fisherman
description: The generosity of the river begins with the humble gudgeon. Gather 6 000 gudgeons and learn the fisherman's path.

name: Fisherman
description: Shrimp swarm the shallows. Gather 6 000 shrimps and prove your skill as a fisherman.

name: Intermediate Fisherman
description: The swift trout challenges all but the best. Gather 6 000 trouts and rise in the ranks.

name: Expert Fisherman
description: The elusive bass is the pride of expert anglers. Gather 6 000 bass.

name: Professional Fisherman
description: Salmon run strong in wild rivers. Gather 6 000 salmons and become a professional fisherman.

name: Amateur Alchemist
description: Sunflowers are the base of every potion. Gather 6 000 sunflowers and start your journey as an alchemist.

name: Intermediate Alchemist
description: Nettle leaves sting the unwary. Gather 6 000 nettle leaves and brew stronger potions.

name: Expert Alchemist
description: Glowstem leaves illuminate the darkest recipes. Gather 6 000 glowstems and master your craft.

name: Pearl Fisher
description: Small pearls shimmer in the deep. Gather 500 Small Pearls and become a true pearl fisher.

name: Lok'tar ogar!
description: The orcs roar their war cry, seeking conquest. Show your strength and defeat 500 orcs in battle.

name: Feather Me Impressed
description: The legend of the endless flock beckons. Prove your might (and appetite) by slaughtering 1 000 chickens.

name: Cabinet Maker
description: Master cabinetry requires variety: craft hardwood, spruce, and dead wood planks to prove your woodworking expertise.

name: Worker
description: From raw ore to refined metal: forge iron bars, steel bars, and gold bars to prove your worth as a skilled worker.

name: Adamantite Mastery
description: Legends are forged in adamantite. Craft 500 adamantite bars to prove your mastery.

name: King of the Forest
description: The forest crowns those who master its hunters. Fell wolves, flying snakes, and mushmush to claim the title of King of the Forest.

name: Lich Please!
description: The ancient Lich rules the dead lands, defying the living. Challenge fate and defeat the Lich to restore balance.

name: Money Time!
description: Gold opens many doors. Use 20 bags of gold and enjoy your fortune.

name: Bite! Oh, algae!
description: Sometimes, all you catch is algae. Gather 2 500 algaes and embrace the surprises of fishing.

name: Adept
description: Your journey continues as you grow in strength. Reach level 25 and become a true adept.

name: Take her down!
description: The Goblin Priestess commands the forest's raiders. End her reign by defeating her in battle.

name: The New Bandit
description: Claim the mantle of the forest's outlaws. Drop a Bandit Armor and show your new allegiance.

name: Arachnophobia Conquered
description: Face your fears and clear the webs! Defeat 1 000 spiders to conquer your arachnophobia.

name: Master Lumberjack
description: Amidst the scorching desert, even palm trees fall to the axe. Gather 6 000 Palm Wood as a master lumberjack.

name: Master Fisherman
description: The seas hold countless challenges. Prove your mastery by gathering 6 000 Swordfish.

name: Master Miner
description: Deep within the earth lies strength unyielding. Gather 6 000 Adamantite Ore to prove yourself as a master miner.

name: Master Alchemist
description: Even the desert yields its secrets to the wise. Gather 6,000 Torch Cactus Flowers as a master alchemist’s triumph.

name: Turning Treasures to Gold
description: Every treasure has its price. Sell 5 Golden Eggs and 5 Golden Shrimps.

name: Tanner's Exchange
description: The tailor offers a precious trade: exchange your hides for fine leather. Buy 25 Hard Leather and 25 Snakeskin to the tailor.

name: I want bacon!
description: The farms overflow with squealing pigs. Satisfy your hunger for glory (and bacon) by slaughtering 1 000 pigs.

name: Cult Destroyer
description: The Cult Emperor weaves dark rituals, threatening the realm. End his blasphemous reign by defeating the Cult Emperor.

name: Making a Nether portal
description: Obsidian bars are the gateway to forbidden realms. Craft 250 obsidian bars.

name: Palm Paradise
description: From desert oasis to crafting bench: transform 500 palm woods into planks and master the art of tropical woodworking.

name: Catch and Cook
description: From river to table, from shallows to the deep sea: cook bass, salmon, and swordfish to prove your mastery as angler and chef.

name: Strange Miner
description: Some ores defy explanation. Gather 3 000 strange ores and uncover their mysteries.

name: Magic Lumberjack
description: Magic wood pulses with energy. Gather 3 000 magic woods and touch the arcane.

name: Alchemist
description: From vial to flask to splash: brew small health potions, minor health potions, and health splash potions to prove your mastery of the healing arts.

name: Cursed Wood, Blessed Victory
description: Cursed wood is dangerous to handle, but it brings victory to the brave. Craft 50 Cursed Planks.

name: Carnivore
description: Satisfy your carnivorous appetite by eating 100 cooked chicken, beef, wolf meat, rat meat, hellhound meat, and desert scorpion meat.

name: Highway Patrol
description: No traveler is safe while highwaymen lurk. Patrol the roads and defeat 1 000 Highwaymen.

name: Potion Brewer
description: The art of alchemy flows through your hands. Craft 100 Enhanced Health Splash Potions and 100 Enhanced Health Potions.

name: Art of teleportation
description: Master the art of teleportation by using recall, forest bank, enchanted, and Sandwhisper potions 100 times each.

name: Gourmet Chef
description: A true gourmand feasts from pot to pie. Savor 300 fish soups, wedges of cheese, mushroom soups, and apple pies to earn your chef's toque.

name: Eat the forbidden fruit
description: Corrupted Fruits tempt all who seek power. Use 100 Corrupted Fruits and taste the forbidden.

name: Secure the island
description: Defeat 50 Sea Marauders to secure the island, earn the villagers trust, and unlock access to the bank.

name: Clean the lab
description: Defeat 100 Cultist Alchemist to secure the house and unlock access to the Rosenblood.

name: Diamond In The Sky
description: Diamonds are forever. Craft 2 diamonds and cherish your treasures.

name: Slimed to None
description: A monstrous slime crowned in the forest. Prove your worth by defeating the King Slime.

name: Grand Master
description: Few ascend to such heights. Reach level 50 and earn the title of Grand Master.

name: Sands of Power
description: The Sandwhisper Empress commands the desert with ancient magic. Defeat her and end her reign over the dunes.

name: Blood of the Cursed
description: In his house, Rosenblood awaits challengers. End the curse by defeating Rosenblood.

name: The Reaper
description: You walk the path of inevitable death. Slay 250 Skeletons, 250 Vampires, and 250 Death Knights.

name: King of the Goblins
description: Assert your dominance over the goblin tribes. Collect the required goblin and wolfrider trophies.

name: Heartbound
description: Legends speak of an amulet forged with lifes essence. Craft a Heart Amulet to claim its power.

name: The Worm Turns
description: Face the terror of dusk and slay the Duskworm.

name: Welcome to Hell
description: A weapon forged from knowledge straight from hell. Craft a Hell Reaper.

name: Magic Power
description: Legends whisper of the Magic Shield. Craft it and wield arcane power.

name: Crafted with Honor
description: A Masterful Necklace is the mark of a true artisan. Craft one and wear your honor.

name: Real Canadian
description: Nothing says Canadian like maple syrup. Craft 250 maple syrups and celebrate the sweet life.

name: Magic Harvester
description: Magic sap is the lifeblood of enchanted forests. Gather 500 Magic Saps.

name: Shining Secrets
description: Rare and radiant, alexandrite is a gem of mystery. Craft 2 Alexandrite to master its brilliance.

name: Queen of the Enchanted Forest
description: Survive 100 fights against Pixie and prove yourself as the true ruler of the Enchanted Forest.

name: Closing The Gate
description: A hellish rift spews its legions. Cut down demons, imps, efreet sultans, and grimlets to seal the gate shut.

name: Life Lover
description: The shards of life are rare and precious. Prove your devotion by dropping 24 Life Crystal Shards.

name: Its Malefic!
description: Malefic Shards pulse with forbidden energy. Drop 24 of these shards to harness their power.

name: The planet thanks you
description: Your eco-actions inspire others. Recycle 2 500 items and earn the planetâ€™s gratitude.

name: Elementary Book
description: Elemental pages hold ancient secrets. Drop 30 Elemental Pages and unlock the power of the elements.

name: Corruption Eradicator
description: Corrupted Gems are the source of many evils. Drop 800 Corrupted Gems and cleanse the world.

name: Coin Collector
description: Wealth lies buried in the island of Sandwhisper. Collect 500 Sandwhisper Coins from its foes.

name: A Peaceful island
description: Peace is never given—it is earned. Slay 250 Sandwardens, 250 Desert Scorpions, 250 Sand Snakes, and 250 Dusk Beetles

name: Cultist Purifier
description: Cultist Acolytes threaten the world with their dark devotion. Cleanse the realm by killing 500 Cultist Acolytes.

name: Sandwhisper's Hidden Treasure
description: Secrets are often sold, not found. Purchase a Sandwhisper Bag.

name: Draconic Harvest
description: Gather dragon bones and red dragon scales from combat drops to complete a true draconic harvest.

name: Ultimate Rune
description: Acquire a Powerful Rune from an NPC trader and unlock the strength of an ultimate enchantment.

name: Around The World
description: Travel around the world to defeat all the bosses.

name: Tasks Coins Fan
description: A thousand tasks completed your legend as a helper grows! Complete 1 000 tasks.

name: Secrets in the Sand
description: The Sandwhisper Empress guards forbidden knowledge. Collect 24 Codex Pages from her grasp.

name: King of the Sun
description: Survive 100 fights against Sonnengott and claim your place as the undisputed King of the Sun.
